description: Use this API to change the value of an integer ICON of an auxiliary signal model of a specified FACTS device. The corresponding character CHRICN is set to ‘$$’. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = change_fctsauxmod_icon(fd, isgndx, model, j, idata)
python_syntax: ierr = change_fctsauxmod_icon(fd, isgndx, model, j, idata)

parameters.name: fd
parameters.description: Quoted name of the facts device receiving the of the auxiliary signal model; if an unquoted integer value is specified, the api converts it to a left-justified name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: isgndx
parameters.description: Auxiliary signal injection point number, or the auxiliary signal index. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Icon number to change relative to the start of the block of icons assigned to this model (1 for icon(i), 2 for icon(i+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: idata
parameters.description: New integer icon value. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: invalid ISGNDX value for a FACTS device.
no auxiliary signal model at this index for this FACTS device.
model at this index for this FACTS device is aaa not xxx.
no input ICONs used in model.
ICON number outside of the ICON range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
